# Measurely

> Measurely is a free, browser-based room acoustics analysis tool for audio enthusiasts and home listeners. Upload an impulse response WAV file from REW (Room EQ Wizard) and receive six plain-English acoustic scores — Peaks & Dips, Reflections, Balance, Smoothness, Bandwidth, and a Co-Pilot commentary — along with ranked treatment recommendations and 3D room visualisation. No account required. All processing happens in the browser; nothing is sent to a server.

## Key facts

- Free to use, no account, no upload limit
- Works in any modern browser including iOS Safari
- Accepts impulse response WAV files at 44.1 kHz or 48 kHz (REW recommended)
- Six acoustic scores rated 1–10 with plain-English explanations
- Ranked next-step recommendations (speaker placement, acoustic treatment)
- 3D interactive room visualisation showing speaker positions and reflection paths
- Measurely Remote: optional Raspberry Pi kit for in-room sweep measurement

## Pages

- [Home](https://measurely.uk/): Product overview, how it works, FAQ, interactive demo
- [Privacy Policy](https://measurely.uk/privacy.html): Data handling — no server-side storage of audio or measurements
- [Terms of Service](https://measurely.uk/terms.html): Terms of use
